setup_text: Before deploying fleets, the second player sets aside 1 small or medium ship and up to 3 squadrons, then places 3 objective tokens in the play area beyond distance 3 of both player edges.
special_rule_text: At the start of any round after round 1, the second player may deploy the set-aside units at distance 1 of 1 objective token and remove all objective tokens. If not deploying, the second player may move each objective token within distance 1.
end_of_game_text: Set-aside units are destroyed if their owner has no ships in play or if they remain set aside when the game ends.
timing_notes: The second player cannot deploy set-aside units or move objective tokens at the start of round 1.
clarifications: Set-aside ships and squadrons are not in play; their abilities and upgrades are inactive and they cannot be affected by abilities.
When a set-aside squadron is deployed, set its activation slider to match the initiative token.
During setup, non-set-aside squadrons are destroyed if the second player must deploy a squadron but has no ships in play.
A hyperspace-deployed ship can overlap squadrons; the first player places those squadrons as if the ship had overlapped them while executing a maneuver.

rule_surfaces.summary: Second player chooses whether to deploy set-aside units or move objective tokens.
Deploy set-aside ship and squadrons at distance 1 of one objective token, then remove all tokens.
Destroy set-aside units if their owner has no ships in play or the game ends before deployment.
